# smtpfast_webhook (Resource)

A webhook subscription that delivers SMTPfast events (delivered, bounced, opened, clicked, ...) to a URL.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "smtpfast_webhook" "events" {
  url = "https://example.com/webhooks/smtpfast"
  events = [
    "email.delivered",
    "email.bounced",
    "email.complained",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `events` (List of String) Event types to subscribe to, e.g. `email.delivered`, `email.bounced`, `email.opened`, `email.clicked`.
- `url` (String) The URL that receives webhook POST requests.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the webhook is active.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the webhook.
